name: Catamaran trip around the bay of Fornells and the north coast
description: From the shelter of the great bay of Fornells, a catamaran outing follows the north coast and its most remote coves at an unhurried pace, with stops to swim. Small groups and a stable vessel: a serene way for older children and the young to sail too.

highlights: sail the sheltered bay of Fornells and the north coast towards Cala Pregonda
swimming and snorkelling stops at coves that are hard to reach by land
small-group outings, stable and comfortable for all ages
